calendar.matters:
Petition For Accounting, Demand For Distribution, For Breach Of Trust, Removal And Appointment Of Independent Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Colton Dumont for respondent Jodi Birenbaum (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Accounting, Demand for Distribution, for Breach of Trust, Removal and Appointment of Independent Trustee.

There was no appearance by petitioner. Mr. Dumont reported that an ex parte application to dismiss the action with prejudice had been filed following the Court's prior ruling on demurrer. The Court stated it would not rule ex parte at this time and took the matter off calendar.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
